title: The Pentrahon
description: Adds verrrrrrrry scary entities, a fluids, and horror cosmetics to your world.
body:
# Pentrahon

Horror mod for Forge 1.20.1. Adds five entities, a gun, a fluid, and some dimensions.

## Entities

Five total. Most have a lot of health. Some can't be killed. A few only take damage from specific things like arrows. Walking into the wrong one will get you killed in one hit.

A few of them:

- **Via Wementitnt** — the strongest of the five
- **Nothing** — does what the name suggests, until it doesn't
- **Simon 12** — you'll know when you see him
- **Herobrine** — slow

Abilities cover lightning storms, dimension teleportation, and one-shot kills. They all behave differently, so you actually have to learn them.

## Other stuff

- **Blood** — fluid that spawns lightning rings when placed
- **Hyper Webster** — a gun that fires massive fireballs.
- **Custom dimensions**, including one that's entirely red
- **Horror paintings and banners**

There's a few hidden things in the mod too. Go find them.

More entities and content in future updates.

**Requires Forge 1.20.1.**
